headline: CDW (CDW) Stock Price Jumps 29% Is The Valuation Story Changing?
summary: If you are wondering whether CDW's current share price reflects its true worth, a good starting point is to look closely at how the stock is valued using different methods. The stock recently closed at US$132.19, with returns that include a 29.5% gain over the past 30 days but a decline of 20.9% over the last year. Recent coverage has focused on CDW's role as a technology solutions provider and on how broader tech sector sentiment may be influencing interest in the stock. This context helps...
